CREATE TABLE tab1 (m Map(String, UInt64)) ENGINE=Memory;
INSERT INTO tab1 VALUES ({'key1':1, 'key2':10}), ({'key1':2,'key2':20}), ({'key1':3,'key2':30});
SELECT m['key2'] FROM tab1;
CREATE TABLE tab2 (m Map(String, UInt64)) ENGINE=Memory;
INSERT INTO tab2 VALUES ({'key1':100}), ({});
SELECT m['key1'] FROM tab2;
CREATE TABLE tab3 (m Map(String, UInt64), n UInt64) ENGINE=Memory;
INSERT INTO tab3 VALUES (map('key1', 1, 'key2', 2), 100), (map('key1', 3, 'key2', 4), 200);
SELECT n, m['key1'] FROM tab3 WHERE n > 150;
CREATE TABLE tab4 AS tab3;
ALTER TABLE tab4 ADD COLUMN k_map Map(String, String);
INSERT INTO tab4 SELECT m, n, map('keyA', 'valueA', 'keyB', 'valueB') FROM tab3;
SELECT k_map['keyA'], n FROM tab4;
CREATE TABLE tab5 (m Map(Int32, String), n Map(String, UInt64)) ENGINE=Memory;
INSERT INTO tab5 VALUES (map(1, 'A', 2, 'B'), map('key1', 100)), (map(3, 'C', 4, 'D'), map('key2', 200));
SELECT arrayJoin(m.keys) AS keys, n['key1'] FROM tab5;
CREATE TABLE tab6 (m Map(String, UInt64)) ENGINE=Memory;
INSERT INTO tab6 VALUES (map('key1', 1, 'key2', 2, 'key3', 3));
SELECT m.keys, m.values FROM tab6;
SELECT m['key4'] FROM tab6;
CREATE TABLE tab7 (col1 Int32, col2 Map(String, Int32)) ENGINE=Memory;
INSERT INTO tab7 VALUES (1, map('k1', 1)), (2, map('k1', 2, 'k2', 3));
SELECT col1, col2['k1'], col2['k2'] FROM tab7;
CREATE TABLE tab8 AS SELECT col1, col2 FROM tab7;
ALTER TABLE tab8 ADD COLUMN additional_map Map(String, Int32);
INSERT INTO tab8 SELECT col1, map('extra_key', 100) FROM tab7;
SELECT additional_map['extra_key'], col2['k1'] FROM tab8;
